text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's first three years in<n>the Twinkle
Series have come to an<n>end.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her track record is nothing to sneeze<n>at. She takes
it in and steels herself<n>for a momentous decision.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Big news, Trainer! I'm... I'm ending<n>my days as
an Umamusume otaku!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, I'm a normal<n>Umamusume
befitting my<n>achievements!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As a result of that decision...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Oh my! It's another loss for Agnes<n>Digital!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who would've expected her losing<n>streak to
follow her to a G3 race?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, huff... Bleeeeghhh...What's happening to me? It's likemy legs have been replaced by twobars of solid steel.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're so heavy I can't even lift<n>them. What is
this...

text_block_list.name: Fan Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Man. Agnes Digital's been real garbo<n>lately.

text_block_list.name: Fan Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
You think her age is catching up with<n>her or
something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooof! My aaage?! But my life is<n>essentially a
static work of fiction. I<n>can't age!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you hear the things they're<n>saying about me,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: Well, you have kinda lost your spirit...
Well, you have kinda lost your spirit...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know... It's almost like I've lost the<n>very reason
I choose to run...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Life as a normal racer is difficult.<n>What is it that
even motivates regular<n>runners in the first place? I
can't<n>figure it out at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What? Quit? You don't meanracing, do you?
choice_data_list: No. Quit trying to be a "normal" Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat? But... I made a decision. I<n>can't go
back on my word!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems my proposal comes as a<n>shock, but after
some thought...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Still... Mmm, hmm. There might be<n>something to
that. I started off as a<n>simple Uma fan, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was never anything refined or<n>noble. My love
for them grew and<n>grew, and that's what got me
here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I abandoned those feelings. I'm<n>like a canary
that's forgotten the sky,<n>or a thief who's lost her
mask! Which<n>means...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! Return to me! Come, my<n>blazing passion,
and awaken once<n>more from your slumber!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The light that once shined in her eyes<n>returns, and
then...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here we are, on the final stretch of<n>the Yasuda
Kinen! It was a fierce start<n>but, in the end—wait!
Who's that<n>closing in from the outside?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: UUUUUMMMAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: My love for Umas knows NOOO LIMIT!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Agnes Digital! What a miraculous<n>comeback!
And she's set a new<n>track record!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Um, sorry for all the fuss I've caused.<n>I kinda lost
my true self for a while<n>there.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But everything's fine now! As long<n>as there are
cute Umas out there, I'll<n>be here!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A true comeback story, brought forth<n>by enjoying
what she likes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
However, her fans have no way of<n>knowing
what's been going on<n>behind the scenes.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That... was incredible. Even betterthan when she was at her peak...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I don't get her. How on earth did she<n>do that...
